operations.notes:
Returns the list of licenses installed on the system with information about the unique identifier,
the issuing and expiration dates, the customer identifier, name and optionally the site identifier
as well as a list of SKU units (optional).
There are 3 types of licenses and at most one of each type can be installed on the system.
The types are: full, audit and evaluation. Only full licenses have SKU items with name, purchased
quantity, optionally expiration dates and attached devices.
For more information on supported devices, supported models and virtual types please refer to 'Licensing TOS' section in the Tufin Knowledge Center .

Returns the list of licenses installed on the system with information about the unique identifier,
the issuing and expiration dates, the customer identifier, name and optionally the site identifier
as well as a list of SKU units (optional).
A single license can be chosen via its numeric identifier or by their type: 1 - full, 2 - audit and 3 - evaluation.
For more information on supported devices, supported models and virtual types please refer to 'Licensing TOS' section in the Tufin Knowledge Center .

Returns details for a tiered license installed on the system.
If no tiered is installed, the response will contain a 'hint' field with a message similar to:
"non-tiered license is installed. Use securetrack/api/licenses to fetch it."

If no license installed the response will return the 'Tier-0'.
examples:
https://192.168.1.1/securetrack/api/licenses/tiered-license
 |{
    "supported": true,
    "version": "3.1",
    "tier": "Enterprise",
    "customer_name": "RND License Testing",
    "license_file_id": "##############",
    "site_name": "Enterprise (Lab)",
    "site_type": "lab",
    "site_id": "site_id_test_value",
    "installed": "2023-04-11T14:37:41.528+00:00",
    "expires": "2024-03-22T22:00:00.000+00:00",
    "status": "valid",
	"type": "full",
    "messages": [
        {
            "severity": "warning",
            "code": "LICENSE_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE_IN_X_DAYS",
            "message": "License about to expire in $1 days",
            "params": [
                "7"
            ]
        },
        {
            "severity": "error",
            "code": "SEND_AUDIT_IN_ORDER_TO_BECOME_UPGRADABLE",
            "message": "Send audit in order to become upgradable",
            "params": [
                "30"
            ]
        }
    ]
    
}
